primary_text:
I run a cattle farm in Kempsey. I know what it takes to raise beef properly. Open pasture. No hormones. No shortcuts.

I also know what happens in the supermarket supply chain. Thousands of kilometres. Weeks in cold storage. The farm name disappears.

That's why I partnered with FarmThru. My beef goes from our farm to the Brookvale hub within days. Your family gets it fresh. You know where it came from.

Only food we'd feed our own.

-- Rachel Ward, Rachel's Farm
headline: I know what happens to the beef
description: Rachel Ward, founder of Rachel's Farm, Kempsey NSW. Partner farm of FarmThru.
creative_brief: Rachel walking through her Kempsey paddock, mid-stride, natural expression. Cattle grazing behind her. Documentary style, not posed.
